title: Display artist profile name in 'Uploaded by' label

requirements.text: In the ContentCard component (and any other location that displays an 'Uploaded by' label), replace the generic identifier with the actual artist/user display name fetched from their profile. Look up the uploader's profile using their principal and render their display name (e.g., 'Uploaded by <ArtistName>') instead of a raw principal or placeholder text.

quotes: I want upload by to be the artists name of profile

acceptanceCriteria: The 'Uploaded by' section on ContentCard shows the uploader's profile display name, not a raw principal or generic label.
If the uploader has no display name set, fall back gracefully (e.g., show a shortened principal or 'Unknown Artist').
The same fix applies consistently wherever 'Uploaded by' is rendered across the app (e.g., ContentDetailPage if applicable).
The display name links or navigates to the uploader's user profile page.

nonGoals: Changing the backend data model for content metadata.
Modifying the messaging or conversation features.
